name: deskmate-updater-stub
description: Lightweight Windows updater with native PowerShell + WinForms UI

scripts.build:win-x64: npm run build && pkg dist/stub.js --targets node22-win-x64 --output release/updater-win-x64.exe
scripts.build:win-arm64: npm run build && pkg dist/stub.js --targets node22-win-arm64 --output release/updater-win-arm64.exe
scripts.build:all: npm run build:win-x64 && npm run build:win-arm64

author: Deskmate Team
